title: Systems for imaging
abstract: A detector module (112, 510, 9100) of an imaging apparatus, the detector module (112, 510, 9100) may include a detector assembly (210) configured to detect a signal associated with an object; a cover assembly (220) configured to accommodate the detector assembly (210); and at least one cooling assembly (230, 5300,700) operably coupled to the cover assembly (220). The at least one cooling assembly (230, 5300, 700) may be configured to cool the detector assembly (210) by providing a cooling medium to the cover assembly (220).
